name: radius-tokens
description: Focused test set for evaluating radius token naming: semantic (--radius-container) vs numeric scale (--radius-inner through --radius-container). Tests whether LLMs correctly select and apply radius tokens.

prompts.prompt: Create a card component with rounded corners that contains a button. The card should have appropriate border radius for a container, and the button should have a smaller radius.
followUps: Now make the card corners sharper — use a smaller radius
Add a badge inside the card that uses a pill-shaped radius

prompts.prompt: Build a modal dialog with rounded corners. Inside it, put a text input and a code block. The dialog should have container-level rounding, the input should have element-level rounding, and the code block should have subtle content-level rounding.
followUps: Add a dropdown menu inside the dialog — what radius should it use?
Make the dialog corners match a card's corners

prompts.prompt: Create a custom theme that makes all corners sharper — reduce all border radii. Use the XDS theme system with defineTheme.
followUps: Now create a 'rounded' theme variant that increases all radii
Create a brutalist variant with zero border radius everywhere

prompts.prompt: I want to create a theme where cards have 16px border radius, buttons have 8px, and small elements like code blocks have 4px. Set this up with defineTheme.
followUps: Also make badges fully rounded (pill shape) in this theme
Add a version of this theme with doubled radii for a softer look

prompts.prompt: Build a pricing card that has a header section, a body with a list of features, and a footer with a CTA button. Apply appropriate border radius at each nesting level — the outer card should have the largest radius, and inner elements should have progressively smaller radii.
followUps: The inner content corners look too sharp relative to the outer card. How do I calculate the right inner radius?
Apply concentric radius: inner radius = outer radius - padding

prompts.prompt: Create a nested layout: a page section with large rounded corners contains a card with medium rounded corners, which contains a form with inputs that have small rounded corners. Use CSS variables for the radius values.
followUps: The nested corners look off — the inner card's corners are too round relative to the outer section. Fix the visual harmony.
Use the formula innerRadius = max(0, outerRadius - padding) to fix it

prompts.prompt: Build a notification toast that appears in the corner of the screen. It should have a dismiss button and an icon. What border radius should the toast use?
followUps: Add a progress bar at the bottom of the toast — what radius should it have?
Make the toast use the same radius as a dropdown menu

prompts.prompt: Create a user avatar component that's circular, a status badge that's pill-shaped, and a tooltip that has subtle rounding. Use the appropriate radius tokens for each.
followUps: Add a card below the avatar that contains user info — what radius should it use?
What's the difference between the radius token for the tooltip vs the card?

prompts.prompt: Build a theme switcher that lets users choose between three radius styles: 'Sharp' (no rounding), 'Default' (standard rounding), and 'Soft' (extra rounding). Each option should preview how cards and buttons look.
followUps: How would you implement this with a radius multiplier instead of overriding each token individually?
Add a slider that lets users set a custom radius multiplier from 0 to 2

prompts.prompt: Create a dropdown menu that appears below a button. The dropdown should have the same border radius as cards/modals. Inside the dropdown, each menu item should have subtle rounding on hover.
followUps: Group menu items into sections with a divider — should the divider have any radius?
The first and last items should have slightly more rounding to match the container's corners

prompts.prompt: I'm using the XDS theme but I want to override just the radius tokens. Create a theme that keeps all default colors and spacing but makes corners more rounded — specifically, I want container-level elements to have 16px radius and interactive elements to have 12px radius.
followUps: Also override the small/content radius to 8px
Now create a second theme variant where all these values are halved

prompts.prompt: Build a table with rounded outer corners but sharp inner cell borders. The table container should have container-level rounding, but cells should have no border radius.
followUps: Add a header row that matches the table's top corners
What radius token represents 'no rounding'?
